The README was added as a new file in this push.\n\n## Gaps Found\n\n- **No inline code examples in the README** — The Examples section only links to a generic `.NET Management Library Code Samples` URL; there are no embedded snippets demonstrating common operations (create, get, list, delete a ConfidentialLedger).\n- **\"Key concepts\" section is a placeholder** — It only contains a link to general Azure SDK docs; it should describe service-specific concepts such as `ConfidentialLedgerResource`, `ConfidentialLedgerCollection`, ledger types (`Public`/`Private`), and SKUs.\n- **No dedicated snippet-backed sample test file** — There is no `tests/Samples/Sample*.cs` file with `#region Snippet:` tags for the `Update-Snippets.ps1` tooling to inject into the README.\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify files\n\n**Edit** `sdk/confidentialledger/Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger/README.md`\n\nReplace the generic \"Key concepts\" section:\n\n```markdown\n## Key concepts\n\nKey concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html).\n```\n\nwith service-specific content:\n\n```markdown\n## Key concepts\n\n- **`ConfidentialLedgerResource`** — represents a single confidential ledger instance. Use it to get, update, or delete the ledger and to retrieve its URI and properties.\n- **`ConfidentialLedgerCollection`** — scoped to a `ResourceGroupResource`; use it to create or enumerate confidential ledgers within a resource group.\n- **Ledger type** (`ConfidentialLedgerType`) — `Public` or `Private`, controls network access to the ledger.\n- **Ledger SKU** (`ConfidentialLedgerSku`) — `Standard` or `Basic`, determines node count and throughput.\n- **Security principals** — identities (AAD-based or certificate-based) granted access to the ledger, each with an assigned role (`Administrator`, `Contributor`, or `Reader`).\n\nFor general key concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET, see [here](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html).\n```\n\nReplace the placeholder Examples section:\n\n```markdown\n## Examples\n\nCode samples for using the management library for .NET can be found in the following locations\n- [.NET Management Library Code Samples](https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples)\n```\n\nwith snippet-backed content:\n\n```markdown\n## Examples\n\n### Create a Confidential Ledger\n\n```C# Snippet:CreateConfidentialLedger\n```\n\n### Get a Confidential Ledger\n\n```C# Snippet:GetConfidentialLedger\n```\n\n### List Confidential Ledgers in a Resource Group\n\n```C# Snippet:ListConfidentialLedgers\n```\n\n### Delete a Confidential Ledger\n\n```C# Snippet:DeleteConfidentialLedger\n```\n```\n\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\n\n**Create** `sdk/confidentialledger/Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger/tests/Samples/Sample_ConfidentialLedgerCRUD.cs`\n\nUse the auto-generated samples in `tests/Generated/Samples/` as reference for the API calls. Provide test-friendly versions wrapped with `#region Snippet:` tags:\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Azure.Core;\nusing Azure.Identity;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger.Models;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\n\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger.Samples\n{\n    public partial class ConfidentialLedgerSamples\n    {\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only validating compilation of examples\")]\n        public async Task CreateConfidentialLedgerSample()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:CreateConfidentialLedger\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003cyour-subscription-id\u003e\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"\u003cyour-resource-group\u003e\";\n            ResourceIdentifier resourceGroupResourceId =\n                ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId, resourceGroupName);\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\n\n            ConfidentialLedgerCollection collection = resourceGroupResource.GetConfidentialLedgers();\n\n            string ledgerName = \"myLedger\";\n            ConfidentialLedgerData data = new ConfidentialLedgerData(new AzureLocation(\"eastus\"))\n            {\n                Properties = new ConfidentialLedgerProperties\n                {\n                    LedgerType = ConfidentialLedgerType.Public,\n                    LedgerSku = ConfidentialLedgerSku.Standard,\n                    AadBasedSecurityPrincipals =\n                    {\n                        new AadBasedSecurityPrincipal\n                        {\n                            PrincipalId = Guid.Parse(\"\u003cyour-principal-id\u003e\"),\n                            TenantId = Guid.Parse(\"\u003cyour-tenant-id\u003e\"),\n                            LedgerRoleName = ConfidentialLedgerRoleName.Administrator,\n                        }\n                    },\n                },\n            };\n\n            ArmOperation\u003cConfidentialLedgerResource\u003e lro =\n                await collection.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, ledgerName, data);\n            ConfidentialLedgerResource ledger = lro.Value;\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Created ledger: {ledger.Data.Id}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only validating compilation of examples\")]\n        public async Task GetConfidentialLedgerSample()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:GetConfidentialLedger\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003cyour-subscription-id\u003e\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"\u003cyour-resource-group\u003e\";\n            string ledgerName = \"myLedger\";\n\n            ResourceIdentifier ledgerId = ConfidentialLedgerResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(\n                subscriptionId, resourceGroupName, ledgerName);\n            ConfidentialLedgerResource ledger = client.GetConfidentialLedgerResource(ledgerId);\n            ledger = await ledger.GetAsync();\n\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Ledger URI: {ledger.Data.Properties.LedgerUri}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only validating compilation of examples\")]\n        public async Task ListConfidentialLedgersSample()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:ListConfidentialLedgers\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003cyour-subscription-id\u003e\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"\u003cyour-resource-group\u003e\";\n resourceGroupResource = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupResourceId);\n\n            await foreach (ConfidentialLedgerResource ledger in resourceGroupResource.GetConfidentialLedgers())\n            {\n                Console.WriteLine(ledger.Data.Name);\n            }\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only validating compilation of examples\")]\n        public async Task DeleteConfidentialLedgerSample()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:DeleteConfidentialLedger\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003cyour-subscription-id\u003e\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"\u003cyour-resource-group\u003e\";\n ledgerName);\n            ConfidentialLedgerResource ledger = client.GetConfidentialLedgerResource(ledgerId);\n            await ledger.DeleteAsync(WaitUntil.Completed);\n            Console.WriteLine(\"Ledger deleted.\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\n\nThe README at 2026-04-22T14:41:42.9777536Z 
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9777609Z ## What Changed
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9777621Z 
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9778680Z PR #58385 introduced the `Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger` management library, including generated sources, a CHANGELOG (version 1.0.2), scenario tests (CreateLedgerTest.cs, DeleteLedgerTest.cs, UpdateLedgerTest.cs), and auto-generated compilation samples under `tests/Generated/Samples/`. The README was added as a new file in this push.
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9778686Z 
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9778764Z ## Gaps Found
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9778769Z 
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9779618Z - **No inline code examples in the README** — The Examples section only links to a generic `.NET Management Library Code Samples` URL; there are no embedded snippets demonstrating common operations (create, get, list, delete a ConfidentialLedger).
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9780528Z - **"Key concepts" section is a placeholder** — It only contains a link to general Azure SDK docs; it should describe service-specific concepts such as `ConfidentialLedgerResource`, `ConfidentialLedgerCollection`, ledger types (`Public`/`Private`), and SKUs.
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9781224Z - **No dedicated snippet-backed sample test file** — There is no `tests/Samples/Sample*.cs` file with `#region Snippet:` tags for the `Update-Snippets.ps1` tooling to inject into the README.
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9781231Z

2026-04-22T14:41:42.9781895Z ### Step 1: Modify files
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9781900Z

2026-04-22T14:41:42.9782137Z

2026-04-22T14:41:42.9782240Z

2026-04-22T14:41:42.9782463Z 
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9782816Z Key concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html).
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9782886Z ```
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9782890Z 
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9782989Z with service-specific content:
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9782994Z 
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9783059Z ```markdown
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9783133Z ## Key concepts
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9783137Z 
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9783703Z - **`ConfidentialLedgerResource`** — represents a single confidential ledger instance. Use it to get, update, or delete the ledger and to retrieve its URI and properties.
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9784221Z - **`ConfidentialLedgerCollection`** — scoped to a `ResourceGroupResource`; use it to create or enumerate confidential ledgers within a resource group.
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9784567Z - **Ledger type** (`ConfidentialLedgerType`) — `Public` or `Private`, controls network access to the ledger.
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9784915Z - **Ledger SKU** (`ConfidentialLedgerSku`) — `Standard` or `Basic`, determines node count and throughput.
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9785557Z - **Security principals** — identities (AAD-based or certificate-based) granted access to the ledger, each with an assigned role (`Administrator`, `Contributor`, or `Reader`).
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9785563Z 
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9785922Z For general key concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET, see [here](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html).
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9785987Z ```
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9785991Z 
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9786099Z Replace the placeholder Examples section:
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9786104Z 
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9786170Z ```markdown
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9786250Z ## Examples
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9786254Z 
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9786491Z Code samples for using the management library for .NET can be found in the following locations
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9786709Z - [.NET Management Library Code Samples](https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples)
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9786779Z ```

2026-04-22T14:41:42.9787377Z 
2026-04-22T14:41:42.9787474Z ```C# Snippet:GetConfidentialLedger

2026-04-22T14:41:42.9787541Z
